title: grewia boivinii
intro: Grewia boivinii is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the velvet apple or velvet tree. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Grewia boivinii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of Grewia boivinii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
